title: Revolut Integrates Its Crypto Exchange with AI Assistants as Agentic Trading Spreads
summary: Revolut X now connects to Claude, Gemini, OpenClaw, and Cursor, letting crypto users analyze, backtest, and execute trades via AI prompts.
body:
Revolut X has integrated its crypto exchange with popular AI assistants, including Claude, Gemini, OpenClaw, and Cursor. This move enables users to analyze, backtest, and execute crypto trades through natural language prompts, streamlining the trading process.

The integration allows users to ask AI assistants to perform complex trading tasks, such as analyzing market trends, backtesting strategies, and executing trades. This feature is part of a broader trend in 'agentic trading,' where AI agents handle more aspects of the trading process autonomously.

For everyday users, this integration could make crypto trading more accessible and less intimidating. By using simple prompts, users can leverage advanced trading tools without needing deep technical knowledge. This could attract more retail investors to the crypto market.

Revolut X is not the only platform exploring AI-driven trading. As agentic trading gains traction, more exchanges and financial services may follow suit. Users should watch for similar integrations from other major players in the crypto space.

If you're a Revolut X user, you can start experimenting with these AI-assisted trading features right away. Keep an eye on how these tools evolve and whether they improve your trading outcomes.
